description: You are a web developer hired to conduct a network performance audit for a client who runs three major news portals. Conduct a network performance audit for https://www.bbc.com, https://www.reuters.com, and https://www.theguardian.com. For each site, identify the top 3 largest individual network resources by transfer size, the total number of HTTP requests, and any performance observations such as slow resources or large third-party scripts. Compile these findings into a professional performance audit report at /home/ga/Desktop/network_audit_report.txt, ensuring it includes specific resource sizes and request counts for all three sites.

metadata.occupation_context: Web Developer - cross-browser network performance testing and documentation
